title: polystichum dilatatum
intro: Polystichum dilatatum, also known as the Broad-leaved Holly Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in East Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Polystichum dilatatum are said to include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as an ingredient in teas, tinctures, and infusions to support overall health and well-being.
